Compare two niche detection results

Source: R/NicheDetect.R
CompareNiche.Rd

Compares two sets of niche/ROI detection results using Venn diagrams and distance analysis. Identifies overlapping spots and calculates distances between niche centers.

Usage

CompareNiche(IST_obj = NULL, meta_key1 = NULL, meta_key2 = NULL)

Arguments

IST_obj

An IST object containing niche detection results

meta_key1

Character, first metadata key for comparison

meta_key2

Character, second metadata key for comparison

Value

NULL (invisible), generates plots and prints comparison statistics

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Compare two niche detection methods
CompareNiche(
  IST_obj = ist_object,
  meta_key1 = "M2_NicheDetect_Lasso_20240101",
  meta_key2 = "M2_NicheDetect_STS_20240101"
)
} # }
